title: Gateway 503 usage log means upstream returned non-2xx
summary: MercAll API Gateway records `result_reason=upstream_failed` when an upstream HTTP response is received with a non-2xx status other than request/gateway timeout; the returned upstream status is persisted as `status_code` and usually passed through to `/v1/chat/completions`. If `httpClient.Do` fails before any response, the log instead records status_code 502 with `request_failed`. For stream requests that receive a non-2xx upstream response, the service reads the error body, refunds the preauthorization, persists `success=false`, and returns the upstream status/body as a non-stream error response.

Image requests support JSON model rewrite and multipart form model rewrite with updated multipart boundary; image fallback billing uses data/request image count * 1000 output tokens. Jimeng video uses req_key for model selection/rewrite, exposes /jimeng and /jimeng/, and fallback bills one generation as 1000 output tokens. title: Expose DevMesh runtime status through MCP
summary: DevMesh now provides a mesh_get_status MCP tool so Codex and other MCP clients can verify the running DevMesh version, mode, project root/store, daemon details, and knowledge counts before assuming their configuration is correct. Runtime version reporting is centralized through DEV_MESH_VERSION and release version checks now verify that constant against the root and CLI package versions.

title: Added admin gateway API key management page
summary: [done] Added a read-only admin API key list for MercAll gateway keys: backend GET /api/v1/admin/gateway/keys joins gateway_user_keys with users and supports keyword/status/purpose pagination; frontend adds /admin/gateway/keys under 网关管理 as 密钥管理 with default-masked SecretValue display and copy/reveal controls. Updated admin endpoint types, route/i18n labels, and policy template openapi entry. Verification: frontend npm run typecheck passed, backend go test ./generate ./internal/repository/api_gateway ./internal/service/api_gateway ./internal/api/routes passed; go test ./internal/api/controllers still fails on the pre-existing stream context-canceled test.

title: Gateway usage logs must persist token detail fields
content: When adding gateway billing token detail fields such as cache_read_tokens, cache_write_tokens, cache_write_1h_tokens, image_input_tokens, audio_input_tokens, and audio_output_tokens, add them to entities.GatewayUsageLog and also to apigatewayrepo.GatewayUsageLogCreateInput/CreateWithKeyUsage. The API-key persistence path in APIGatewayService.persistUsageLogWithInterfaceType must pass these detail fields through; otherwise billing may calculate cache pricing correctly while usage logs persist zero detail tokens.
summary: GatewayUsageLog cache and multimodal token fields must stay aligned across entity, migration, repository input, and API key persistence path.

title: Gateway Jimeng video uses req_key as model key
summary: MercAll gateway video generation support adds an internal `jimeng_video` protocol for `/jimeng/` requests. The request model is resolved from JSON `req_key` with `model` as a fallback; configured `upstream_model_name` rewrites the outgoing `req_key`. Jimeng video requests do not use chat non-stream wrapping. Because the NewAPI Jimeng video submit response has no standard usage payload, billing estimates one generated video as `1000` completion tokens so `upstream_output_price` can represent per-video pricing.

title: Gateway billing supports OpenAI Images and Jimeng video protocols
summary: [done] Implemented gateway protocol support for OpenAI image generation/edit endpoints and Jimeng video submit endpoint. Image requests support JSON model rewrite and multipart form model rewrite with updated multipart boundary; image fallback billing uses data/request image count * 1000 output tokens. Jimeng video uses req_key for model selection/rewrite, exposes /jimeng and /jimeng/, and fallback bills one generation as 1000 output tokens. Verification passed: backend go tests for api_gateway/gatewaybilling/routes/entities, frontend typecheck, and git diff --check with CRLF warnings only.

title: Gateway image endpoints use openai_images billing protocol
summary: MercAll gateway image generation/editing support uses an internal `openai_images` request protocol for `/v1/images/generations` and `/v1/images/edits`, avoiding the OpenAI Chat non-stream-to-stream wrapper. JSON image generation and multipart image edit requests both rewrite `model` to the configured upstream model. Image usage from OpenAI/NewAPI responses maps `input_tokens` to prompt tokens, `input_tokens_details.image_tokens` to image input tokens, and `output_tokens` to completion tokens. When image responses lack usage, billing estimates output as `image_count * 1000` completion tokens, using response `data` length first and request `n` as fallback so `upstream_output_price` can represent per-image pricing.

summary: [done] 已从网关计费配置链路移除 agent_enabled 和 is_default：前端 AdminInterfacePricingPage 不再展示“首页 Agent 可选/默认 Agent 模型”开关，也不再提交、导出或显示对应标签；frontend admin API 类型删除对应字段。后端 GatewayModelPricing 实体、admin 请求/响应 DTO、Upsert/List/Import 逻辑、pricing/channel repository 查询均移除这两个字段；首页/路由选择只依赖 pricing enabled 和 priority。新增 dropGatewayModelPricingAgentColumns 迁移删除 gateway_model_pricings.agent_enabled/is_default，并补充迁移测试。验证通过 npm run typecheck -- --pretty false、go test -count=1 ./internal/repository/api_gateway ./internal/service/api_gateway ./internal/service/gatewaybilling ./internal/pkg/database、git diff --check；go test -count=1 ./internal/... 仍有既有 controller 流式测试失败 TestStreamCompatibleProxyResponseOnlyIgnoresErrorsAfterCompletionChunkWasWritten/tail_write_error_after_done，失败为 context canceled，与本次字段删除无关。

title: Gateway chat models support context window token limits
content: Implemented in backend entity meta accessors, admin gateway channel DTO/service mapping, API model catalog response, LeapLite model config, and AdminInterfaceChannelsPage editor. Added tests for meta parsing, catalog merge/propagation, runtime validation, and LeapLite propagation.
summary: MercAll gateway channel model metadata now uses `context_window_tokens` for chat model context window limits. `0` means unset. Admin channel model save stores the value in `gateway_channel_models.meta`; list/discovery DTOs and `/v1/models` `APIModelResp` expose it; LeapLite model config forwards it. Proxy requests validate configured chat limits before preauthorization using existing local token estimates, rejecting over-limit requests without charging or calling upstream. Aggregated model catalogs merge duplicate model limits conservatively by choosing the smaller positive value.

title: LeapLite Agent Control runtime config endpoint
content: Implementation is in `backend/internal/service/leap_lite/service.go`, `backend/internal/api/controllers/leap_lite_controller.go`, `backend/internal/api/routes/router.go`, and generated policy OpenAPI. Target tests cover provider/model default selection, fallback image model selection, raw `tools.websearch`, top-level `remote_tools`, MCP file-only shape, duration string fields, and rejection when no chat model is available.
summary: MercAll now adds a separate authenticated user endpoint `GET /api/v1/user/leap-lite/agent-control/config` with scope `applications.leap_lite.agent_control_config`. It does not change the legacy `/user/leap-lite/config` response. The new endpoint returns `data.config` as a full Agent Control runtime config object with required top-level fields app/server/log/storage/message_channel/llm/tools/workspace/control_api/commands/persona and explicit disabled `remote_tools`. LLM providers are derived from enabled gateway chat models and use `provider/model` references; `tools.websearch` keeps the raw field name, `tools.mcp.file` only stores the local MCP config path, and startup config does not include `custom_fields`.

title: LeapLite new-config endpoint returns Agent Control runtime config
content: The config builder derives LLM providers from enabled gateway chat models with provider/model references, emits raw `tools.websearch`, top-level disabled `remote_tools`, MCP file-only config, required startup top-level sections, and no `custom_fields`. Tests cover the runtime config shape and no-chat-model rejection.
summary: MercAll uses the authenticated user endpoint `GET /api/v1/user/leap-lite/new-config` for the new LeapLite Agent Control runtime config. The legacy `/api/v1/user/leap-lite/config` remains unchanged. The new endpoint returns `data.config` as a full Agent Control startup runtime config object, not a patch or model summary. Scope/operationId is `applications.leap_lite.agent_control_config`.

title: LeapLite new-config follows latest Agent Control runtime shape
content: Validated with service tests covering raw config shape, remote_tools, tools.websearch, fetch/chrome, MCP file-only config, context_window, and local injection placeholders. Legacy `/api/v1/user/leap-lite/config` remains unchanged.
summary: MercAll `GET /api/v1/user/leap-lite/new-config` now emits Agent Control runtime config with latest shape details: top-level `remote_tools` uses disabled defaults with timeout/local_exec/files/fetch_url/chrome/mcp sections; `tools` includes `max_chat_tool_calls`, `fetch_url`, `chrome`, and `local_exec.pty_enabled`; LLM model entries include `context_window`; machine-local fields such as `server.address`, `workspace.dir`, and `tools.local_exec.workdir` are left empty for LeapLite local injection instead of hardcoding absolute paths or ports.

title: LeapLite new-config leaves local path fields empty
content: This refines the Agent Control runtime config contract so backend does not hardcode client machine paths or ports. Target tests assert these fields stay empty and that the legacy LeapLite config endpoint remains separate.
summary: MercAll `GET /api/v1/user/leap-lite/new-config` leaves machine-local path/port fields empty for LeapLite local inference. Empty placeholders include `server.address`, `storage.sqlite.path`, `workspace.dir`, `tools.skills.dir`, `tools.local_exec.workdir`, `tools.local_exec.env_path`, [REDACTED:sensitive-path]`, and `tools.mcp.file`. The endpoint still emits the full Agent Control runtime config structure and business/account fields from the backend.

summary: GatewayUsageLog cache and multimodal token fields must stay aligned across entity, migration, repository input, and API key persistence path.

title: LeapLite image/video extensions use Gateway credentials

source.ref: current LeapLite extension gateway credential change

content: Implemented through `buildLeapLiteExtensionsConfigWithInput` in `backend/internal/service/leap_lite/service.go`. Tests cover the raw Agent Control config builder and the legacy config business response. Docs were updated so `extensions.leapimage.api_key` and `extensions.leapvideo.api_key` are no longer described as LeapSkills user credentials.
summary: LeapLite config endpoints now split extension credentials: `leapppt.modules.image` still uses the LeapSkills user credential/base URL, while `leapimage` uses the LeapLite gateway API key with the `/v1` OpenAI Images base URL and `leapvideo` uses the LeapLite gateway API key with the public backend root for the `/jimeng/` video gateway. This applies to both `/api/v1/user/leap-lite/config` and `/api/v1/user/leap-lite/new-config`.

title: Gateway image endpoints use openai_images billing protocol
summary: MercAll gateway image generation/editing support uses an internal `openai_images` request protocol for `/v1/images/generations` and `/v1/images/edits`, avoiding the OpenAI Chat non-stream-to-stream wrapper. JSON image generation and multipart image edit requests both rewrite `model` to the configured upstream model. Image usage from OpenAI/NewAPI responses maps `input_tokens` to prompt tokens, `input_tokens_details.image_tokens` to image input tokens, and `output_tokens` to completion tokens. When image responses lack usage, billing estimates output as `image_count * 1000` completion tokens, using response `data` length first and request `n` as fallback so `upstream_output_price` can represent per-image pricing.

title: Gateway usage logs must persist token detail fields
content: When adding gateway billing token detail fields such as cache_read_tokens, cache_write_tokens, cache_write_1h_tokens, image_input_tokens, audio_input_tokens, and audio_output_tokens, add them to entities.GatewayUsageLog and also to apigatewayrepo.GatewayUsageLogCreateInput/CreateWithKeyUsage. The API-key persistence path in APIGatewayService.persistUsageLogWithInterfaceType must pass these detail fields through; otherwise billing may calculate cache pricing correctly while usage logs persist zero detail tokens.
summary: GatewayUsageLog cache and multimodal token fields must stay aligned across entity, migration, repository input, and API key persistence path.

title: Gateway chat models support context window token limits
content: Implemented in backend entity meta accessors, admin gateway channel DTO/service mapping, API model catalog response, LeapLite model config, and AdminInterfaceChannelsPage editor. Added tests for meta parsing, catalog merge/propagation, runtime validation, and LeapLite propagation.
summary: MercAll gateway channel model metadata now uses `context_window_tokens` for chat model context window limits. `0` means unset. Admin channel model save stores the value in `gateway_channel_models.meta`; list/discovery DTOs and `/v1/models` `APIModelResp` expose it; LeapLite model config forwards it. Proxy requests validate configured chat limits before preauthorization using existing local token estimates, rejecting over-limit requests without charging or calling upstream. Aggregated model catalogs merge duplicate model limits conservatively by choosing the smaller positive value.

title: LeapLite new-config leaves local path fields empty
content: This refines the Agent Control runtime config contract so backend does not hardcode client machine paths or ports. Target tests assert these fields stay empty and that the legacy LeapLite config endpoint remains separate.
summary: MercAll `GET /api/v1/user/leap-lite/new-config` leaves machine-local path/port fields empty for LeapLite local inference. Empty placeholders include `server.address`, `storage.sqlite.path`, `workspace.dir`, `tools.skills.dir`, `tools.local_exec.workdir`, `tools.local_exec.env_path`, [REDACTED:sensitive-path]`, and `tools.mcp.file`. The endpoint still emits the full Agent Control runtime config structure and business/account fields from the backend.

title: Gateway Jimeng video uses req_key as model key
summary: MercAll gateway video generation support adds an internal `jimeng_video` protocol for `/jimeng/` requests. The request model is resolved from JSON `req_key` with `model` as a fallback; configured `upstream_model_name` rewrites the outgoing `req_key`. Jimeng video requests do not use chat non-stream wrapping. Because the NewAPI Jimeng video submit response has no standard usage payload, billing estimates one generated video as `1000` completion tokens so `upstream_output_price` can represent per-video pricing.

Agent Control `/api/v1/user/leap-lite/new-config` provider model entries use `context_window`. `0` means unset.

title: Gateway image endpoints use openai_images billing protocol

When image responses lack usage, billing estimates output as `image_count * 1000` completion tokens, using response `data` length first and request `n` as fallback so `upstream_output_price` can represent per-image pricing.

title: LeapLite new-config leaves local path fields empty
content: This refines the Agent Control runtime config contract so backend does not hardcode client machine paths or ports. Target tests assert these fields stay empty and that the legacy LeapLite config endpoint remains separate.
summary: MercAll `GET /api/v1/user/leap-lite/new-config` leaves machine-local path/port fields empty for LeapLite local inference. Empty placeholders include `server.address`, `storage.sqlite.path`, `workspace.dir`, `tools.skills.dir`, `tools.local_exec.workdir`, `tools.local_exec.env_path`, [REDACTED:sensitive-path]`, and `tools.mcp.file`. The endpoint still emits the full Agent Control runtime config structure and business/account fields from the backend.

title: LeapLite media extensions use billable gateway image/video models
content: Implemented via `ListModelsForUserKey`/`listPricedModels` feeding `buildLeapLiteExtensionsConfigWithInput`, then filtering extension model IDs by exact model type. summary: LeapLite `extensions.leapppt`, `extensions.leapimage`, and `extensions.leapvideo` must derive media model defaults/lists from the gateway priced model catalog, filtering by `model_type=image` or `model_type=video`. Models whose channel, channel model, or pricing is disabled are excluded; if no matching model is available the related extension is disabled and model fields are empty.

summary: LeapLite config payloads now expose only `context_window` for model context-window limits. title: Gateway Jimeng video uses req_key as model key
summary: MercAll gateway video generation support adds an internal `jimeng_video` protocol for `/jimeng/` requests. title: Gateway 503 usage log means upstream returned non-2xx
summary: MercAll API Gateway records `result_reason=upstream_failed` when an upstream HTTP response is received with a non-2xx status other than request/gateway timeout; the returned upstream status is persisted as `status_code` and usually passed through to `/v1/chat/completions`. If `httpClient.Do` fails before any response, the log instead records status_code 502 with `request_failed`. For stream requests that receive a non-2xx upstream response, the service reads the error body, refunds the preauthorization, persists `success=false`, and returns the upstream status/body as a non-stream error response.

title: Gateway chat models support context window token limits
content: Implemented in backend entity meta accessors, admin gateway channel DTO/service mapping, API model catalog response, LeapLite model config, and AdminInterfaceChannelsPage editor. Added tests for meta parsing, catalog merge/propagation, runtime validation, and LeapLite propagation.
summary: MercAll gateway channel model metadata now uses `context_window_tokens` for chat model context window limits. `0` means unset. Admin channel model save stores the value in `gateway_channel_models.meta`; list/discovery DTOs and `/v1/models` `APIModelResp` expose it; LeapLite model config forwards it. Proxy requests validate configured chat limits before preauthorization using existing local token estimates, rejecting over-limit requests without charging or calling upstream. Aggregated model catalogs merge duplicate model limits conservatively by choosing the smaller positive value.

summary: [done] 已在 frontend/src/pages/Admin/AdminInterfacePricingPage.tsx 中移除列表内的上游价格、计费策略、系统售价三块行内展示列，改为在操作列新增“详情”按钮，点击后通过 Dialog 展示计费详情。详情弹窗包含模型/渠道标题、计费/Agent/默认/优先级/规则码状态，以及上游价格、计费策略、系统售价三组完整字段。DataTable minWidth 从 1520 调整为 980。验证通过 npm run typecheck -- --pretty false、git diff --check 和 npm run build；build 生成/刷新了 frontend/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo。

title: 修正网关专项价格 0 的计费语义
summary: [done] 已修正网关模型计费中专项价格为 0 时被 fallback 到输入价/输出价的问题。backend/internal/service/gatewaybilling/usage.go 的缓存读取、缓存创建、1h 缓存创建、图片输入、音频输入、音频补全上游价 helper 现在直接返回各自字段，0 表示无该部分价格；backend/internal/service/api_gateway/api_gateway_service.go 的后台列表/详情系统价同样不再 fallback。迁移 backend/internal/pkg/database/migrate.go 移除了新增专项价格列时把 0 回填为输入/输出价的逻辑。frontend/src/pages/Admin/AdminInterfacePricingPage.tsx 的编辑预览和保存也改为专项价格为空/0 保存为 0，不再自动沿用主输入/输出价格。新增 gatewaybilling 和 api_gateway 测试覆盖 0 不 fallback。验证通过 npm run typecheck -- --pretty false、go test -count=1 ./internal/service/gatewaybilling ./internal/service/api_gateway ./internal/pkg/database、git diff --check（仅 CRLF 提示）。

title: Expose DevMesh runtime status through MCP
summary: DevMesh now provides a mesh_get_status MCP tool so Codex and other MCP clients can verify the running DevMesh version, mode, project root/store, daemon details, and knowledge counts before assuming their configuration is correct. Runtime version reporting is centralized through DEV_MESH_VERSION and release version checks now verify that constant against the root and CLI package versions.

title: Release DevMesh 0.1.2
summary: [done] Released DevMesh 0.1.2 by bumping synchronized workspace/CLI/runtime versions, validating with pnpm release:check, committing c7adff0, tagging v0.1.2, and pushing main plus the tag. GitHub Actions NPM Publish and Release Artifacts both completed successfully; npm dist-tag alpha now points to devmesh@0.1.2 and GitHub prerelease v0.1.2 is published.

Verify future website edits with a leak scan for local path tokens and source-dev command examples before publishing.

title: README should stay product-facing and bilingual
content: Commit b9897c3 rewrote the root README into a product-facing overview: install command, local-first value, assistant-led MCP capture model, shareable .dev-mesh knowledge files, core commands, interface links, and security notes. It added README-EN.md with parallel English content, CONTRIBUTING.md for development and knowledge-store policy, and .github/pull_request_template.md for PR expectations. Avoid reintroducing long internal implementation dumps into README; link to devmesh.xyun.dev, docs/release.md, and CONTRIBUTING.md instead.
summary: DevMesh root README should be a concise product entrypoint, with README.md in Chinese and README-EN.md in English, while detailed CLI/API/development material lives in website docs, CONTRIBUTING.md, and release docs.

title: Avoid npm download badges for fresh package launches
content: The npm downloads API returned 0 for last-month devmesh downloads immediately after the 0.1.3 alpha publish, and Shields rendered the README badge as `0/month`. Replaced the downloads badge in README.md and README-EN.md with a stable docs badge pointing to devmesh.xyun.dev. Prefer version, docs, platform, and compatibility badges over download counters until there is sustained package traffic.
summary: DevMesh README should avoid npm monthly download badges during early releases because the npm downloads API can legitimately report 0 for a new package and make the product look broken or inactive.

title: Datawhale submission prep needs repo metadata, README structure, and proposal draft
content: The Datawhale prep pass added MIT licensing, a local CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md that adopts the Datawhale DOPMC conduct principles, README and README-EN sections for audience, online reading, progress, project team, contribution flow, license, and Datawhale plan, plus docs/datawhale-dopmc-application.md as a proposal issue draft. The prior repository rename follow-up is complete: the GitHub repository path is now `xy200303/dev-mesh`, matching the lowercase naming expected for submission.
summary: Preparing DevMesh for Datawhale DOPMC required repository-level materials beyond core product docs: a software license, a code-of-conduct adoption file, README sections for audience/progress/team/license, and a ready-to-submit DOPMC proposal draft. Those materials are now in place, and the GitHub repository has already been renamed to the lowercase dev-mesh form.

title: 短信验证码 TTL 与重发冷却的区别
content: 排查点：`backend/internal/service/sms/sms_service.go` 中 `smsSendCooldown = 30 * time.Second`，`redis.Set(ctx, key, code, 5*time.Minute)`；前端 `frontend/src/pages/Auth/*Page.tsx` 使用 `setSmsCountdown(30)`，`frontend/src/pages/Profile/ProfileBasicPage.tsx` 使用 `SMS_COOLDOWN_SECONDS = 30`。腾讯云短信模板正文不在仓库内，本地只传一个模板参数 code，若控制台模板写了“30秒内有效”会造成文案不一致。
summary: MercAll 短信验证码服务中，验证码 Redis key `sms:{scene}:{phone}` 的 TTL 是 5 分钟；重发冷却 key `sms:cooldown:{scene}:{phone}` 是 30 秒。前端登录、注册、忘记密码、换绑手机页面显示的 `smsCountdown`/`SMS_COOLDOWN_SECONDS` 也是 30 秒重发冷却。用户若 30 秒后点击重发，同场景同手机号的新验证码会覆盖旧验证码，旧码会立即失效。

title: Gateway 503 usage log means upstream returned non-2xx
summary: MercAll API Gateway records `result_reason=upstream_failed` when an upstream HTTP response is received with a non-2xx status other than request/gateway timeout; the returned upstream status is persisted as `status_code` and usually passed through to `/v1/chat/completions`. If `httpClient.Do` fails before any response, the log instead records status_code 502 with `request_failed`. For stream requests that receive a non-2xx upstream response, the service reads the error body, refunds the preauthorization, persists `success=false`, and returns the upstream status/body as a non-stream error response.

title: Gateway image endpoints use openai_images billing protocol
summary: MercAll gateway image generation/editing support uses an internal `openai_images` request protocol for `/v1/images/generations` and `/v1/images/edits`, avoiding the OpenAI Chat non-stream-to-stream wrapper. JSON image generation and multipart image edit requests both rewrite `model` to the configured upstream model. Image usage from OpenAI/NewAPI responses maps `input_tokens` to prompt tokens, `input_tokens_details.image_tokens` to image input tokens, and `output_tokens` to completion tokens. When image responses lack usage, billing estimates output as `image_count * 1000` completion tokens, using response `data` length first and request `n` as fallback so `upstream_output_price` can represent per-image pricing.

title: 修正网关专项价格 0 的计费语义
summary: [done] 已修正网关模型计费中专项价格为 0 时被 fallback 到输入价/输出价的问题。backend/internal/service/gatewaybilling/usage.go 的缓存读取、缓存创建、1h 缓存创建、图片输入、音频输入、音频补全上游价 helper 现在直接返回各自字段，0 表示无该部分价格；backend/internal/service/api_gateway/api_gateway_service.go 的后台列表/详情系统价同样不再 fallback。迁移 backend/internal/pkg/database/migrate.go 移除了新增专项价格列时把 0 回填为输入/输出价的逻辑。frontend/src/pages/Admin/AdminInterfacePricingPage.tsx 的编辑预览和保存也改为专项价格为空/0 保存为 0，不再自动沿用主输入/输出价格。新增 gatewaybilling 和 api_gateway 测试覆盖 0 不 fallback。验证通过 npm run typecheck -- --pretty false、go test -count=1 ./internal/service/gatewaybilling ./internal/service/api_gateway ./internal/pkg/database、git diff --check（仅 CRLF 提示）。

title: Gateway pricing empty fields mean zero and all-zero means free
content: Implemented in `AdminInterfacePricingPage` by defaulting new pricing form price/multiplier fields to empty strings and parsing empty strings as 0. Implemented in `APIGatewayService.UpsertPricings`, `resolveGatewayDisplayPrices`, and `gatewaybilling` display-price helpers by preserving rounded zero values directly. Tests cover all-zero save persistence, zero multiplier display prices, and zero multiplier billing behavior.
summary: MercAll gateway pricing now treats empty admin pricing inputs as `0`; if every upstream price, multiplier, and extra fee is `0`, the model is a free model. Backend save, display-price calculation, and billing helpers must not fallback zero multipliers to `1` or zero specific upstream prices to the main input/output price.

title: Gateway Jimeng video uses req_key as model key
summary: MercAll gateway video generation support adds an internal `jimeng_video` protocol for `/jimeng/` requests. The request model is resolved from JSON `req_key` with `model` as a fallback; configured `upstream_model_name` rewrites the outgoing `req_key`. Jimeng video requests do not use chat non-stream wrapping. Because the NewAPI Jimeng video submit response has no standard usage payload, billing estimates one generated video as `1000` completion tokens so `upstream_output_price` can represent per-video pricing.

title: LeapLite media extensions use billable gateway image/video models
content: Implemented via `ListModelsForUserKey`/`listPricedModels` feeding `buildLeapLiteExtensionsConfigWithInput`, then filtering extension model IDs by exact model type. Legacy `/api/v1/user/leap-lite/config` exposes the full enabled billable model catalog in `models[]`; Agent Control `/new-config` keeps image/video out of `llm.providers` and only references them from `extensions`. Business tests seed enabled and pricing-disabled image/video models to assert disabled pricing is excluded.
summary: LeapLite `extensions.leapppt`, `extensions.leapimage`, and `extensions.leapvideo` must derive media model defaults/lists from the gateway priced model catalog, filtering by `model_type=image` or `model_type=video`. Models whose channel, channel model, or pricing is disabled are excluded; if no matching model is available the related extension is disabled and model fields are empty.

title: Gateway usage logs must persist token detail fields
content: When adding gateway billing token detail fields such as cache_read_tokens, cache_write_tokens, cache_write_1h_tokens, image_input_tokens, audio_input_tokens, and audio_output_tokens, add them to entities.GatewayUsageLog and also to apigatewayrepo.GatewayUsageLogCreateInput/CreateWithKeyUsage. The API-key persistence path in APIGatewayService.persistUsageLogWithInterfaceType must pass these detail fields through; otherwise billing may calculate cache pricing correctly while usage logs persist zero detail tokens.
summary: GatewayUsageLog cache and multimodal token fields must stay aligned across entity, migration, repository input, and API key persistence path.

title: Gateway pricing empty fields mean zero and all-zero means free
content: Implemented in `AdminInterfacePricingPage` by defaulting new pricing form price/multiplier fields to empty strings and parsing empty strings as 0. Implemented in `APIGatewayService.UpsertPricings`, `resolveGatewayDisplayPrices`, and `gatewaybilling` display-price helpers by preserving rounded zero values directly. Tests cover all-zero save persistence, zero multiplier display prices, and zero multiplier billing behavior.
summary: MercAll gateway pricing now treats empty admin pricing inputs as `0`; if every upstream price, multiplier, and extra fee is `0`, the model is a free model. Backend save, display-price calculation, and billing helpers must not fallback zero multipliers to `1` or zero specific upstream prices to the main input/output price.

title: Gateway pricing empty fields mean zero and all-zero means free
content: Implemented in `AdminInterfacePricingPage` by defaulting new pricing form price/multiplier fields to empty strings and parsing empty strings as 0. Backend save, display-price calculation, and billing helpers must not fallback zero multipliers to `1` or zero specific upstream prices to the main input/output price.

title: LeapLite media extensions use billable gateway image/video models
content: Implemented via `ListModelsForUserKey`/`listPricedModels` feeding `buildLeapLiteExtensionsConfigWithInput`, then filtering extension model IDs by exact model type. Legacy `/api/v1/user/leap-lite/config` exposes the full enabled billable model catalog in `models[]`; Agent Control `/new-config` keeps image/video out of `llm.providers` and only references them from `extensions`. Business tests seed enabled and pricing-disabled image/video models to assert disabled pricing is excluded.
summary: LeapLite `extensions.leapppt`, `extensions.leapimage`, and `extensions.leapvideo` must derive media model defaults/lists from the gateway priced model catalog, filtering by `model_type=image` or `model_type=video`. Models whose channel, channel model, or pricing is disabled are excluded; if no matching model is available the related extension is disabled and model fields are empty.

title: 网关计费列表改为详情弹窗展示
summary: [done] 已在 frontend/src/pages/Admin/AdminInterfacePricingPage.tsx 中移除列表内的上游价格、计费策略、系统售价三块行内展示列，改为在操作列新增“详情”按钮，点击后通过 Dialog 展示计费详情。详情弹窗包含模型/渠道标题、计费/Agent/默认/优先级/规则码状态，以及上游价格、计费策略、系统售价三组完整字段。DataTable minWidth 从 1520 调整为 980。验证通过 npm run typecheck -- --pretty false、git diff --check 和 npm run build；build 生成/刷新了 frontend/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo。

title: 修正网关专项价格 0 的计费语义
summary: [done] 已修正网关模型计费中专项价格为 0 时被 fallback 到输入价/输出价的问题。backend/internal/service/gatewaybilling/usage.go 的缓存读取、缓存创建、1h 缓存创建、图片输入、音频输入、音频补全上游价 helper 现在直接返回各自字段，0 表示无该部分价格；backend/internal/service/api_gateway/api_gateway_service.go 的后台列表/详情系统价同样不再 fallback。迁移 backend/internal/pkg/database/migrate.go 移除了新增专项价格列时把 0 回填为输入/输出价的逻辑。frontend/src/pages/Admin/AdminInterfacePricingPage.tsx 的编辑预览和保存也改为专项价格为空/0 保存为 0，不再自动沿用主输入/输出价格。新增 gatewaybilling 和 api_gateway 测试覆盖 0 不 fallback。验证通过 npm run typecheck -- --pretty false、go test -count=1 ./internal/service/gatewaybilling ./internal/service/api_gateway ./internal/pkg/database、git diff --check（仅 CRLF 提示）。

title: Gateway image endpoints use openai_images billing protocol
summary: MercAll gateway image generation/editing support uses an internal `openai_images` request protocol for `/v1/images/generations` and `/v1/images/edits`, avoiding the OpenAI Chat non-stream-to-stream wrapper. JSON image generation and multipart image edit requests both rewrite `model` to the configured upstream model. Image usage from OpenAI/NewAPI responses maps `input_tokens` to prompt tokens, `input_tokens_details.image_tokens` to image input tokens, and `output_tokens` to completion tokens. When image responses lack usage, billing estimates output as `image_count * 1000` completion tokens, using response `data` length first and request `n` as fallback so `upstream_output_price` can represent per-image pricing.

title: 移除网关计费 Agent 展示/默认配置字段
summary: [done] 已从网关计费配置链路移除 agent_enabled 和 is_default：前端 AdminInterfacePricingPage 不再展示“首页 Agent 可选/默认 Agent 模型”开关，也不再提交、导出或显示对应标签；frontend admin API 类型删除对应字段。后端 GatewayModelPricing 实体、admin 请求/响应 DTO、Upsert/List/Import 逻辑、pricing/channel repository 查询均移除这两个字段；首页/路由选择只依赖 pricing enabled 和 priority。新增 dropGatewayModelPricingAgentColumns 迁移删除 gateway_model_pricings.agent_enabled/is_default，并补充迁移测试。验证通过 npm run typecheck -- --pretty false、go test -count=1 ./internal/repository/api_gateway ./internal/service/api_gateway ./internal/service/gatewaybilling ./internal/pkg/database、git diff --check；go test -count=1 ./internal/... 仍有既有 controller 流式测试失败 TestStreamCompatibleProxyResponseOnlyIgnoresErrorsAfterCompletionChunkWasWritten/tail_write_error_after_done，失败为 context canceled，与本次字段删除无关。

title: Gateway 503 usage log means upstream returned non-2xx
summary: MercAll API Gateway records `result_reason=upstream_failed` when an upstream HTTP response is received with a non-2xx status other than request/gateway timeout; the returned upstream status is persisted as `status_code` and usually passed through to `/v1/chat/completions`. If `httpClient.Do` fails before any response, the log instead records status_code 502 with `request_failed`. For stream requests that receive a non-2xx upstream response, the service reads the error body, refunds the preauthorization, persists `success=false`, and returns the upstream status/body as a non-stream error response.

title: 网关计费默认语义：价格 0、倍率 1
content: 本轮已在 AdminInterfacePricingPage 创建/编辑表单默认填充上游价格 0、倍率 1、附加费 0；后端 UpsertPricings 保存时将非正倍率归一为 1；后台展示与 gatewaybilling 扣费的 display price 计算同样把非正倍率按 1 兜底；导入计费配置时价格缺省保留自身字段/新建为 0，倍率缺省独立默认 1。相关验证：go test -count=1 ./internal/service/api_gateway ./internal/service/gatewaybilling，npm run typecheck -- --pretty false。
summary: 网关计费配置统一为：上游各类价格字段未填/缺省按 0 处理，计费策略各类倍率未填或为 0 按默认 1 处理；专项价格不再继承输入/输出价格，专项倍率也不再继承输入/输出倍率。免费模型由上游价格和附加费全为 0 决定，而不是通过 0 倍率实现。

title: 免费网关模型不能用价格判断模型存在
content: 本轮修复删除了 ProxyRequest 和 completeTextWithInternalTool 中价格全 0 即返回“模型不存在”的拦截。新增 TestInternalToolCompletionAcceptsEnabledFreePricing 和 TestProxyRequestAcceptsEnabledFreePricing，覆盖 enabled pricing 价格全 0 时仍可走到上游。验证通过 go test -count=1 ./internal/service/api_gateway ./internal/service/gatewaybilling；git diff --check 仅 CRLF 提示。
summary: 网关模型路由不能再用 gatewayModelHasConfiguredPrice 判断模型是否存在；价格全 0 的启用 pricing 是合法免费模型，应继续进入代理和内部调用链路，最终由计费层按 0 金额结算。

title: 免费网关模型不能用价格判断模型存在

title: Updated LeapLite config API documentation
summary: [done] Rewrote `docs/leaplite-config.md` as a dual-endpoint API document covering both `/api/v1/user/leap-lite/new-config` and `/api/v1/user/leap-lite/config`. The doc now explains the Agent Control runtime config shape, legacy config shape, model context window fields, extension media root base URLs without `/v1`, `sk-` gateway keys vs `uc-` user credentials, remote_tools defaults, and local path fields left empty for LeapLite injection.

title: Gateway chat models support context window token limits
content: Implemented in backend entity meta accessors, admin gateway channel DTO/service mapping, API model catalog response, LeapLite model config, and AdminInterfaceChannelsPage editor. Added tests for meta parsing, catalog merge/propagation, runtime validation, and LeapLite propagation.
summary: MercAll gateway channel model metadata now uses `context_window_tokens` for chat model context window limits. `0` means unset. Admin channel model save stores the value in `gateway_channel_models.meta`; list/discovery DTOs and `/v1/models` `APIModelResp` expose it; LeapLite model config forwards it. Proxy requests validate configured chat limits before preauthorization using existing local token estimates, rejecting over-limit requests without charging or calling upstream. Aggregated model catalogs merge duplicate model limits conservatively by choosing the smaller positive value.

title: Gateway Jimeng video uses req_key as model key
summary: MercAll gateway video generation support adds an internal `jimeng_video` protocol for `/jimeng/` requests. The request model is resolved from JSON `req_key` with `model` as a fallback; configured `upstream_model_name` rewrites the outgoing `req_key`. Jimeng video requests do not use chat non-stream wrapping. Because the NewAPI Jimeng video submit response has no standard usage payload, billing estimates one generated video as `1000` completion tokens so `upstream_output_price` can represent per-video pricing.

title: Added admin gateway API key management page
summary: [done] Added a read-only admin API key list for MercAll gateway keys: backend GET /api/v1/admin/gateway/keys joins gateway_user_keys with users and supports keyword/status/purpose pagination; frontend adds /admin/gateway/keys under 网关管理 as 密钥管理 with default-masked SecretValue display and copy/reveal controls. Updated admin endpoint types, route/i18n labels, and policy template openapi entry. Verification: frontend npm run typecheck passed, backend go test ./generate ./internal/repository/api_gateway ./internal/service/api_gateway ./internal/api/routes passed; go test ./internal/api/controllers still fails on the pre-existing stream context-canceled test.

title: Gateway image endpoints use openai_images billing protocol
summary: MercAll gateway image generation/editing support uses an internal `openai_images` request protocol for `/v1/images/generations` and `/v1/images/edits`, avoiding the OpenAI Chat non-stream-to-stream wrapper. JSON image generation and multipart image edit requests both rewrite `model` to the configured upstream model. Image usage from OpenAI/NewAPI responses maps `input_tokens` to prompt tokens, `input_tokens_details.image_tokens` to image input tokens, and `output_tokens` to completion tokens. When image responses lack usage, billing estimates output as `image_count * 1000` completion tokens, using response `data` length first and request `n` as fallback so `upstream_output_price` can represent per-image pricing.

title: 新增网关媒体生成接口文档
summary: [done] 已新增 docs/gateway-media-generation-api.md，覆盖 LeapAll API Gateway 的图像生成 /v1/images/generations、图像编辑 /v1/images/edits、视频生成 /jimeng/ 的鉴权、模型要求、计费说明、请求参数、curl 示例、响应示例和错误格式。已提交 commit 18d262b（新增网关媒体生成接口文档），验证通过 git diff --check。

title: Gateway usage logs must persist token detail fields
content: When adding gateway billing token detail fields such as cache_read_tokens, cache_write_tokens, cache_write_1h_tokens, image_input_tokens, audio_input_tokens, and audio_output_tokens, add them to entities.GatewayUsageLog and also to apigatewayrepo.GatewayUsageLogCreateInput/CreateWithKeyUsage. The API-key persistence path in APIGatewayService.persistUsageLogWithInterfaceType must pass these detail fields through; otherwise billing may calculate cache pricing correctly while usage logs persist zero detail tokens.
summary: GatewayUsageLog cache and multimodal token fields must stay aligned across entity, migration, repository input, and API key persistence path.

title: 修正网关专项价格 0 的计费语义
summary: [done] 已修正网关模型计费中专项价格为 0 时被 fallback 到输入价/输出价的问题。backend/internal/service/gatewaybilling/usage.go 的缓存读取、缓存创建、1h 缓存创建、图片输入、音频输入、音频补全上游价 helper 现在直接返回各自字段，0 表示无该部分价格；backend/internal/service/api_gateway/api_gateway_service.go 的后台列表/详情系统价同样不再 fallback。迁移 backend/internal/pkg/database/migrate.go 移除了新增专项价格列时把 0 回填为输入/输出价的逻辑。frontend/src/pages/Admin/AdminInterfacePricingPage.tsx 的编辑预览和保存也改为专项价格为空/0 保存为 0，不再自动沿用主输入/输出价格。新增 gatewaybilling 和 api_gateway 测试覆盖 0 不 fallback。验证通过 npm run typecheck -- --pretty false、go test -count=1 ./internal/service/gatewaybilling ./internal/service/api_gateway ./internal/pkg/database、git diff --check（仅 CRLF 提示）。

title: 网关计费默认语义：价格 0、倍率 1
content: 本轮已在 AdminInterfacePricingPage 创建/编辑表单默认填充上游价格 0、倍率 1、附加费 0；后端 UpsertPricings 保存时将非正倍率归一为 1；后台展示与 gatewaybilling 扣费的 display price 计算同样把非正倍率按 1 兜底；导入计费配置时价格缺省保留自身字段/新建为 0，倍率缺省独立默认 1。相关验证：go test -count=1 ./internal/service/api_gateway ./internal/service/gatewaybilling，npm run typecheck -- --pretty false。
summary: 网关计费配置统一为：上游各类价格字段未填/缺省按 0 处理，计费策略各类倍率未填或为 0 按默认 1 处理；专项价格不再继承输入/输出价格，专项倍率也不再继承输入/输出倍率。免费模型由上游价格和附加费全为 0 决定，而不是通过 0 倍率实现。

title: LeapLite config exposes only context_window
content: `buildLeapLiteGatewayModelConfigs` maps gateway `APIModelResp.ContextWindowTokens` into `leapLiteGatewayModelConfig.ContextWindow` only. Tests assert decoded legacy LeapLite model configs omit `context_window_tokens`; Agent Control `/new-config` already used `llm.providers[].models[].context_window` only. Docs now describe only `context_window`, where `0` means unset.
summary: LeapLite config payloads now expose only `context_window` for model context-window limits. The legacy `/api/v1/user/leap-lite/config` `models[]` output no longer includes the duplicate `context_window_tokens` field, while backend gateway internals may still use `APIModelResp.ContextWindowTokens` as the source value.

title: LeapLite extension media base URLs use backend root

source.ref: remove /v1 from LeapLite image/video extension base_url

content: Implemented in `buildLeapLiteExtensionsConfigWithInput` by sourcing image and video extension `base_url` from `GatewayRootURL` (derived from `GatewayBaseURL` only as a fallback). Tests assert both legacy `/config` and raw `/new-config` extension image/video base URLs are root URLs.
summary: LeapLite `extensions` media configs now use the public backend root URL without `/v1` for `leapppt.modules.image.base_url`, `leapimage.base_url`, and `leapvideo.base_url`. Top-level legacy `base_url`, `web_search.base_url`, and Agent Control LLM provider base URLs may still use `/v1` where they represent OpenAI-style SDK endpoints.

title: LeapLite media extensions use billable gateway image/video models
content: Implemented via `ListModelsForUserKey`/`listPricedModels` feeding `buildLeapLiteExtensionsConfigWithInput`, then filtering extension model IDs by exact model type. Legacy `/api/v1/user/leap-lite/config` exposes the full enabled billable model catalog in `models[]`; Agent Control `/new-config` keeps image/video out of `llm.providers` and only references them from `extensions`. Business tests seed enabled and pricing-disabled image/video models to assert disabled pricing is excluded.
summary: LeapLite `extensions.leapppt`, `extensions.leapimage`, and `extensions.leapvideo` must derive media model defaults/lists from the gateway priced model catalog, filtering by `model_type=image` or `model_type=video`. Models whose channel, channel model, or pricing is disabled are excluded; if no matching model is available the related extension is disabled and model fields are empty.

title: LeapLite new-config leaves local path fields empty
content: This refines the Agent Control runtime config contract so backend does not hardcode client machine paths or ports. Target tests assert these fields stay empty and that the legacy LeapLite config endpoint remains separate.
summary: MercAll `GET /api/v1/user/leap-lite/new-config` leaves machine-local path/port fields empty for LeapLite local inference. Empty placeholders include `server.address`, `storage.sqlite.path`, `workspace.dir`, `tools.skills.dir`, `tools.local_exec.workdir`, `tools.local_exec.env_path`, [REDACTED:sensitive-path]`, and `tools.mcp.file`. The endpoint still emits the full Agent Control runtime config structure and business/account fields from the backend.

title: LeapLite media extension provider names differ from gateway protocols
content: Implemented in commit 7caa0f5. The backend gateway still uses `entities.GatewayProviderOpenAIImages` / `openai_images` for billable image routing, model protocols, and `/v1/images/*` APIs. Only LeapLite extension config provider strings are client-facing and use the names accepted by xkclaw: `openai_image` for leapppt image module, `leapskill` for leapimage.
summary: LeapLite extension runtime config must not use the gateway image protocol name as the client provider name. Downlink `extensions.leapppt.modules.image.provider` as `openai_image` and `extensions.leapimage.provider` as `leapskill`; keep gateway model/provider protocol `openai_images` for backend routing and media API docs.

title: NewApi channels do not convert OpenAI Responses to Chat Completions
summary: MercAll normalizes gateway channel provider_type to `newapi`, but request protocols remain distinct. `POST /v1/responses` uses ProviderType `openai_responses` and RoutePath `/v1/responses`; `buildUpstreamURL` forwards `base_url + routePath`, so it calls the upstream NewApi `/v1/responses` endpoint directly. It does not convert Responses requests/events to `/v1/chat/completions`. NewApi-compatible chat-only upstreams can therefore work on `openai_chat` while returning 500/unsupported behavior on `openai_responses`.

title: Gateway pricing empty fields mean zero and all-zero means free
content: Implemented in `AdminInterfacePricingPage` by defaulting new pricing form price/multiplier fields to empty strings and parsing empty strings as 0. Implemented in `APIGatewayService.UpsertPricings`, `resolveGatewayDisplayPrices`, and `gatewaybilling` display-price helpers by preserving rounded zero values directly. Tests cover all-zero save persistence, zero multiplier display prices, and zero multiplier billing behavior.
summary: MercAll gateway pricing now treats empty admin pricing inputs as `0`; if every upstream price, multiplier, and extra fee is `0`, the model is a free model. Backend save, display-price calculation, and billing helpers must not fallback zero multipliers to `1` or zero specific upstream prices to the main input/output price.

summary: LeapLite `extensions.leapppt`, `extensions.leapimage`, and `extensions.leapvideo` must derive media model defaults/lists from the gateway priced model catalog, filtering by `model_type=image` or `model_type=video`. Models whose channel, channel model, or pricing is disabled are excluded; if no matching model is available the related extension is disabled and model fields are empty.

title: Gateway Jimeng video uses req_key as model key
summary: MercAll gateway video generation support adds an internal `jimeng_video` protocol for `/jimeng/` requests. The request model is resolved from JSON `req_key` with `model` as a fallback; configured `upstream_model_name` rewrites the outgoing `req_key`. Jimeng video requests do not use chat non-stream wrapping. Because the NewAPI Jimeng video submit response has no standard usage payload, billing estimates one generated video as `1000` completion tokens so `upstream_output_price` can represent per-video pricing.

title: Gateway billing supports OpenAI Images and Jimeng video protocols
summary: [done] Implemented gateway protocol support for OpenAI image generation/edit endpoints and Jimeng video submit endpoint. Image requests support JSON model rewrite and multipart form model rewrite with updated multipart boundary; image fallback billing uses data/request image count * 1000 output tokens. Jimeng video uses req_key for model selection/rewrite, exposes /jimeng and /jimeng/, and fallback bills one generation as 1000 output tokens. Verification passed: backend go tests for api_gateway/gatewaybilling/routes/entities, frontend typecheck, and git diff --check with CRLF warnings only.

title: Gateway media preauthorization uses output-token fallback units
summary: MercAll gateway media preauthorization estimates `openai_images` by request image count `n` (JSON or multipart, default 1) times 1000 completion tokens, and `jimeng_video` by a fixed 1000 completion tokens per request. The estimated amount is calculated with display output price (`upstream_output_price * output_multiplier`, per 1K tokens) plus `extra_fee` once per request, then the charge session reserves the max of this estimate and `InitialAuthorizationAmountDecimal(pricing)`. Final settlement uses upstream token usage if present; otherwise image fallback counts response `data` length or request `n`, and video fallback remains 1000 output tokens.

title: LeapLite media extension provider names differ from gateway protocols
content: Implemented in commit 7caa0f5. The backend gateway still uses `entities.GatewayProviderOpenAIImages` / `openai_images` for billable image routing, model protocols, and `/v1/images/*` APIs. Only LeapLite extension config provider strings are client-facing and use the names accepted by xkclaw: `openai_image` for leapppt image module, `leapskill` for leapimage.
summary: LeapLite extension runtime config must not use the gateway image protocol name as the client provider name. Downlink `extensions.leapppt.modules.image.provider` as `openai_image` and `extensions.leapimage.provider` as `leapskill`; keep gateway model/provider protocol `openai_images` for backend routing and media API docs.

title: Gateway Jimeng video uses req_key as model key
summary: MercAll gateway video generation support adds an internal `jimeng_video` protocol for `/jimeng/` requests. The request model is resolved from JSON `req_key` with `model` as a fallback; configured `upstream_model_name` rewrites the outgoing `req_key`. Jimeng video requests do not use chat non-stream wrapping. Because the NewAPI Jimeng video submit response has no standard usage payload, billing estimates one generated video as `1000` completion tokens so `upstream_output_price` can represent per-video pricing.

title: Gateway chat models support context window token limits
content: Implemented in backend entity meta accessors, admin gateway channel DTO/service mapping, API model catalog response, LeapLite model config, and AdminInterfaceChannelsPage editor. Added tests for meta parsing, catalog merge/propagation, runtime validation, and LeapLite propagation.
summary: MercAll gateway channel model metadata now uses `context_window_tokens` for chat model context window limits. `0` means unset. Admin channel model save stores the value in `gateway_channel_models.meta`; list/discovery DTOs and `/v1/models` `APIModelResp` expose it; LeapLite model config forwards it. Proxy requests validate configured chat limits before preauthorization using existing local token estimates, rejecting over-limit requests without charging or calling upstream. Aggregated model catalogs merge duplicate model limits conservatively by choosing the smaller positive value.

title: Gateway 503 usage log means upstream returned non-2xx
summary: MercAll API Gateway records `result_reason=upstream_failed` when an upstream HTTP response is received with a non-2xx status other than request/gateway timeout; the returned upstream status is persisted as `status_code` and usually passed through to `/v1/chat/completions`. If `httpClient.Do` fails before any response, the log instead records status_code 502 with `request_failed`. For stream requests that receive a non-2xx upstream response, the service reads the error body, refunds the preauthorization, persists `success=false`, and returns the upstream status/body as a non-stream error response.

title: Datawhale proposal draft should mirror issue body structure

The structure now mirrors how Datawhale proposal issues are typically read: explicit acceptance of the guide and code of conduct, project intro, proposal reasons, target audience, project highlights, completed work, roadmap, owner, and final notes such as repository rename and contact-registration reminders.
summary: The DevMesh Datawhale DOPMC application draft should be written as a near-final issue body, not as generic notes, using sections such as guide acceptance, code-of-conduct acceptance, project intro, reasons, audience, highlights, completed work, roadmap, owner, and submission notes.

title: Expose DevMesh runtime status through MCP
summary: DevMesh now provides a mesh_get_status MCP tool so Codex and other MCP clients can verify the running DevMesh version, mode, project root/store, daemon details, and knowledge counts before assuming their configuration is correct. Runtime version reporting is centralized through DEV_MESH_VERSION and release version checks now verify that constant against the root and CLI package versions.

title: LeapLite media extensions use billable gateway image/video models
content: Implemented via `ListModelsForUserKey`/`listPricedModels` feeding `buildLeapLiteExtensionsConfigWithInput`, then filtering extension model IDs by exact model type. Legacy `/api/v1/user/leap-lite/config` exposes the full enabled billable model catalog in `models[]`; Agent Control `/new-config` keeps image/video out of `llm.providers` and only references them from `extensions`. Business tests seed enabled and pricing-disabled image/video models to assert disabled pricing is excluded.
summary: LeapLite `extensions.leapppt`, `extensions.leapimage`, and `extensions.leapvideo` must derive media model defaults/lists from the gateway priced model catalog, filtering by `model_type=image` or `model_type=video`. Models whose channel, channel model, or pricing is disabled are excluded; if no matching model is available the related extension is disabled and model fields are empty.

title: LeapLite media extensions use billable gateway image/video models
content: Implemented via `ListModelsForUserKey`/`listPricedModels` feeding `buildLeapLiteExtensionsConfigWithInput`, then filtering extension model IDs by exact model type. summary: LeapLite `extensions.leapppt`, `extensions.leapimage`, and `extensions.leapvideo` must derive media model defaults/lists from the gateway priced model catalog, filtering by `model_type=image` or `model_type=video`. Models whose channel, channel model, or pricing is disabled are excluded; if no matching model is available the related extension is disabled and model fields are empty.

title: Gateway billing supports OpenAI Images and Jimeng video protocols
summary: [done] Implemented gateway protocol support for OpenAI image generation/edit endpoints and Jimeng video submit endpoint. Image requests support JSON model rewrite and multipart form model rewrite with updated multipart boundary; image fallback billing uses data/request image count * 1000 output tokens. Jimeng video uses req_key for model selection/rewrite, exposes /jimeng and /jimeng/, and fallback bills one generation as 1000 output tokens. Verification passed: backend go tests for api_gateway/gatewaybilling/routes/entities, frontend typecheck, and git diff --check with CRLF warnings only.

title: Gateway usage logs must persist token detail fields
content: When adding gateway billing token detail fields such as cache_read_tokens, cache_write_tokens, cache_write_1h_tokens, image_input_tokens, audio_input_tokens, and audio_output_tokens, add them to entities.GatewayUsageLog and also to apigatewayrepo.GatewayUsageLogCreateInput/CreateWithKeyUsage. The API-key persistence path in APIGatewayService.persistUsageLogWithInterfaceType must pass these detail fields through; otherwise billing may calculate cache pricing correctly while usage logs persist zero detail tokens.
summary: GatewayUsageLog cache and multimodal token fields must stay aligned across entity, migration, repository input, and API key persistence path.

title: Gateway Jimeng video uses req_key as model key
summary: MercAll gateway video generation support adds an internal `jimeng_video` protocol for `/jimeng/` requests. The request model is resolved from JSON `req_key` with `model` as a fallback; configured `upstream_model_name` rewrites the outgoing `req_key`. Jimeng video requests do not use chat non-stream wrapping. Because the NewAPI Jimeng video submit response has no standard usage payload, billing estimates one generated video as `1000` completion tokens so `upstream_output_price` can represent per-video pricing.

title: Gateway image endpoints use openai_images billing protocol
summary: MercAll gateway image generation/editing support uses an internal `openai_images` request protocol for `/v1/images/generations` and `/v1/images/edits`, avoiding the OpenAI Chat non-stream-to-stream wrapper. JSON image generation and multipart image edit requests both rewrite `model` to the configured upstream model. Image usage from OpenAI/NewAPI responses maps `input_tokens` to prompt tokens, `input_tokens_details.image_tokens` to image input tokens, and `output_tokens` to completion tokens. When image responses lack usage, billing estimates output as `image_count * 1000` completion tokens, using response `data` length first and request `n` as fallback so `upstream_output_price` can represent per-image pricing.

title: Gateway image endpoints use openai_images billing protocol
summary: MercAll gateway image generation/editing support uses an internal `openai_images` request protocol for `/v1/images/generations` and `/v1/images/edits`, avoiding the OpenAI Chat non-stream-to-stream wrapper. JSON image generation and multipart image edit requests both rewrite `model` to the configured upstream model. Image usage from OpenAI/NewAPI responses maps `input_tokens` to prompt tokens, `input_tokens_details.image_tokens` to image input tokens, and `output_tokens` to completion tokens. When image responses lack usage, billing estimates output as `image_count * 1000` completion tokens, using response `data` length first and request `n` as fallback so `upstream_output_price` can represent per-image pricing.

title: LeapLite media extension provider names differ from gateway protocols
content: Implemented in commit 7caa0f5. The backend gateway still uses `entities.GatewayProviderOpenAIImages` / `openai_images` for billable image routing, model protocols, and `/v1/images/*` APIs. Only LeapLite extension config provider strings are client-facing and use the names accepted by xkclaw: `openai_image` for leapppt image module, `leapskill` for leapimage.
summary: LeapLite extension runtime config must not use the gateway image protocol name as the client provider name. Downlink `extensions.leapppt.modules.image.provider` as `openai_image` and `extensions.leapimage.provider` as `leapskill`; keep gateway model/provider protocol `openai_images` for backend routing and media API docs.

title: Gateway usage logs must persist token detail fields
content: When adding gateway billing token detail fields such as cache_read_tokens, cache_write_tokens, cache_write_1h_tokens, image_input_tokens, audio_input_tokens, and audio_output_tokens, add them to entities.GatewayUsageLog and also to apigatewayrepo.GatewayUsageLogCreateInput/CreateWithKeyUsage. The API-key persistence path in APIGatewayService.persistUsageLogWithInterfaceType must pass these detail fields through; otherwise billing may calculate cache pricing correctly while usage logs persist zero detail tokens.
summary: GatewayUsageLog cache and multimodal token fields must stay aligned across entity, migration, repository input, and API key persistence path.

title: Gateway Jimeng video uses req_key as model key
summary: MercAll gateway video generation support adds an internal `jimeng_video` protocol for `/jimeng/` requests. The request model is resolved from JSON `req_key` with `model` as a fallback; configured `upstream_model_name` rewrites the outgoing `req_key`. Jimeng video requests do not use chat non-stream wrapping. Because the NewAPI Jimeng video submit response has no standard usage payload, billing estimates one generated video as `1000` completion tokens so `upstream_output_price` can represent per-video pricing.

title: Gateway chat models support context window token limits
content: Implemented in backend entity meta accessors, admin gateway channel DTO/service mapping, API model catalog response, LeapLite model config, and AdminInterfaceChannelsPage editor. Added tests for meta parsing, catalog merge/propagation, runtime validation, and LeapLite propagation.
summary: MercAll gateway channel model metadata now uses `context_window_tokens` for chat model context window limits. `0` means unset. Admin channel model save stores the value in `gateway_channel_models.meta`; list/discovery DTOs and `/v1/models` `APIModelResp` expose it; LeapLite model config forwards it. Proxy requests validate configured chat limits before preauthorization using existing local token estimates, rejecting over-limit requests without charging or calling upstream. Aggregated model catalogs merge duplicate model limits conservatively by choosing the smaller positive value.

title: Gateway video proxy now uses NewAPI /v1/videos protocol
content:
When changing or configuring MercAll video gateway behavior, use gateway protocol `newapi` and routes `/v1/videos` and `/v1/videos/{id}`. Do not reintroduce the old `jimeng_video` protocol, `/jimeng` routes, or `req_key` request-body rewrites. NewAPI video creation validates model/prompt/string seconds/optional size/seed, preserves the request body model, and filters `X-LeapSkills-Skill-Slug`.

Billing now follows NewAPI async task semantics: `POST /v1/videos` opens a wallet authorization and persists a `preconsumed` usage log keyed by the returned task id, but does not finalize the charge. The task route stores channel/model/pricing/preconsume usage/authorization metadata in memory and Redis. `GET /v1/videos/{id}` forwards to the same upstream channel; when the upstream task status becomes completed/succeeded/done, the gateway finalizes against returned usage (treating video-only `total_tokens` as output tokens) or the preconsume fallback if no usage is returned. Failed/cancelled/timeout/expired task statuses finalize to zero and release/refund the preauthorization. Query-only fallback from usage logs can route tasks but cannot safely settle if the authorization metadata was lost.
summary: MercAll gateway video generation uses protocol `newapi` with `POST /v1/videos` and `GET /v1/videos/{id}`. The old `jimeng_video` `/jimeng`/`req_key` behavior has been removed. Video create now follows NewAPI async billing semantics: reserve/preconsume on task creation, cache the task route and wallet authorization, then settle on terminal query; completed tasks finalize by actual upstream usage when present or preconsume fallback otherwise, and failed/cancelled/expired tasks refund the authorization.

title: LeapLite media extensions use billable gateway image/video models
content: Implemented via `ListModelsForUserKey`/`listPricedModels` feeding `buildLeapLiteExtensionsConfigWithInput`, then filtering extension model IDs by exact model type. Legacy `/api/v1/user/leap-lite/config` exposes the full enabled billable model catalog in `models[]`; Agent Control `/new-config` keeps image/video out of `llm.providers` and only references them from `extensions`. Business tests seed enabled and pricing-disabled image/video models to assert disabled pricing is excluded.
summary: LeapLite `extensions.leapppt`, `extensions.leapimage`, and `extensions.leapvideo` must derive media model defaults/lists from the gateway priced model catalog, filtering by `model_type=image` or `model_type=video`. Models whose channel, channel model, or pricing is disabled are excluded; if no matching model is available the related extension is disabled and model fields are empty.

title: Gateway 503 usage log means upstream returned non-2xx
summary: MercAll API Gateway records `result_reason=upstream_failed` when an upstream HTTP response is received with a non-2xx status other than request/gateway timeout; the returned upstream status is persisted as `status_code` and usually passed through to `/v1/chat/completions`. If `httpClient.Do` fails before any response, the log instead records status_code 502 with `request_failed`. For stream requests that receive a non-2xx upstream response, the service reads the error body, refunds the preauthorization, persists `success=false`, and returns the upstream status/body as a non-stream error response.

title: Gateway pricing empty fields mean zero and all-zero means free
content: Implemented in `AdminInterfacePricingPage` by defaulting new pricing form price/multiplier fields to empty strings and parsing empty strings as 0. Implemented in `APIGatewayService.UpsertPricings`, `resolveGatewayDisplayPrices`, and `gatewaybilling` display-price helpers by preserving rounded zero values directly. Tests cover all-zero save persistence, zero multiplier display prices, and zero multiplier billing behavior.
summary: MercAll gateway pricing now treats empty admin pricing inputs as `0`; if every upstream price, multiplier, and extra fee is `0`, the model is a free model. Backend save, display-price calculation, and billing helpers must not fallback zero multipliers to `1` or zero specific upstream prices to the main input/output price.

The task route stores channel/model/pricing/preconsume usage/authorization metadata in memory and Redis. `GET /v1/videos/{id}` forwards to the same upstream channel; when the upstream task status becomes completed/succeeded/done, the gateway finalizes against returned usage (treating video-only `total_tokens` as output tokens) or the preconsume fallback if no usage is returned. Failed/cancelled/timeout/expired task statuses finalize to zero and release/refund the preauthorization. Query-only fallback from usage logs can route tasks but cannot safely settle if the authorization metadata was lost.
summary: MercAll gateway video generation uses protocol `newapi` with `POST /v1/videos` and `GET /v1/videos/{id}`. The old `jimeng_video` `/jimeng`/`req_key` behavior has been removed. Video create now follows NewAPI async billing semantics: reserve/preconsume on task creation, cache the task route and wallet authorization, then settle on terminal query; completed tasks finalize by actual upstream usage when present or preconsume fallback otherwise, and failed/cancelled/expired tasks refund the authorization.

title: 优化 NewApi 渠道编辑弹窗布局
summary: [done] 将 AdminInterfaceChannelsPage 的 NewApi 渠道编辑弹窗从平铺表单改为分组卡片布局，拆分为基础连接、NewApi 计费、渠道状态三块；为 NewApi 实际计费相关字段增加状态说明和禁用态，减少与渠道启用开关的混淆。已通过 frontend npm run typecheck。

title: 短信验证码 TTL 与重发冷却的区别
content: 排查点：`backend/internal/service/sms/sms_service.go` 中 `smsSendCooldown = 30 * time.Second`，`redis.Set(ctx, key, code, 5*time.Minute)`；前端 `frontend/src/pages/Auth/*Page.tsx` 使用 `setSmsCountdown(30)`，`frontend/src/pages/Profile/ProfileBasicPage.tsx` 使用 `SMS_COOLDOWN_SECONDS = 30`。腾讯云短信模板正文不在仓库内，本地只传一个模板参数 code，若控制台模板写了“30秒内有效”会造成文案不一致。
summary: MercAll 短信验证码服务中，验证码 Redis key `sms:{scene}:{phone}` 的 TTL 是 5 分钟；重发冷却 key `sms:cooldown:{scene}:{phone}` 是 30 秒。前端登录、注册、忘记密码、换绑手机页面显示的 `smsCountdown`/`SMS_COOLDOWN_SECONDS` 也是 30 秒重发冷却。用户若 30 秒后点击重发，同场景同手机号的新验证码会覆盖旧验证码，旧码会立即失效。

title: Gateway 503 usage log means upstream returned non-2xx
summary: MercAll API Gateway records `result_reason=upstream_failed` when an upstream HTTP response is received with a non-2xx status other than request/gateway timeout; the returned upstream status is persisted as `status_code` and usually passed through to `/v1/chat/completions`. If `httpClient.Do` fails before any response, the log instead records status_code 502 with `request_failed`. For stream requests that receive a non-2xx upstream response, the service reads the error body, refunds the preauthorization, persists `success=false`, and returns the upstream status/body as a non-stream error response.

title: Gateway image endpoints use openai_images billing protocol
summary: MercAll gateway image generation/editing support uses an internal `openai_images` request protocol for `/v1/images/generations` and `/v1/images/edits`, avoiding the OpenAI Chat non-stream-to-stream wrapper. JSON image generation and multipart image edit requests both rewrite `model` to the configured upstream model. Image usage from OpenAI/NewAPI responses maps `input_tokens` to prompt tokens, `input_tokens_details.image_tokens` to image input tokens, and `output_tokens` to completion tokens. When image responses lack usage, billing estimates output as `image_count * 1000` completion tokens, using response `data` length first and request `n` as fallback so `upstream_output_price` can represent per-image pricing.

title: LeapLite media extensions use billable gateway image/video models
content: Implemented via `ListModelsForUserKey`/`listPricedModels` feeding `buildLeapLiteExtensionsConfigWithInput`, then filtering extension model IDs by exact model type. Legacy `/api/v1/user/leap-lite/config` exposes the full enabled billable model catalog in `models[]`; Agent Control `/new-config` keeps image/video out of `llm.providers` and only references them from `extensions`. Business tests seed enabled and pricing-disabled image/video models to assert disabled pricing is excluded.
summary: LeapLite `extensions.leapppt`, `extensions.leapimage`, and `extensions.leapvideo` must derive media model defaults/lists from the gateway priced model catalog, filtering by `model_type=image` or `model_type=video`. Models whose channel, channel model, or pricing is disabled are excluded; if no matching model is available the related extension is disabled and model fields are empty.

title: 修正网关专项价格 0 的计费语义
summary: [done] 已修正网关模型计费中专项价格为 0 时被 fallback 到输入价/输出价的问题。backend/internal/service/gatewaybilling/usage.go 的缓存读取、缓存创建、1h 缓存创建、图片输入、音频输入、音频补全上游价 helper 现在直接返回各自字段，0 表示无该部分价格；backend/internal/service/api_gateway/api_gateway_service.go 的后台列表/详情系统价同样不再 fallback。迁移 backend/internal/pkg/database/migrate.go 移除了新增专项价格列时把 0 回填为输入/输出价的逻辑。frontend/src/pages/Admin/AdminInterfacePricingPage.tsx 的编辑预览和保存也改为专项价格为空/0 保存为 0，不再自动沿用主输入/输出价格。新增 gatewaybilling 和 api_gateway 测试覆盖 0 不 fallback。验证通过 npm run typecheck -- --pretty false、go test -count=1 ./internal/service/gatewaybilling ./internal/service/api_gateway ./internal/pkg/database、git diff --check（仅 CRLF 提示）。

title: Gateway usage logs must persist token detail fields
content: When adding gateway billing token detail fields such as cache_read_tokens, cache_write_tokens, cache_write_1h_tokens, image_input_tokens, audio_input_tokens, and audio_output_tokens, add them to entities.GatewayUsageLog and also to apigatewayrepo.GatewayUsageLogCreateInput/CreateWithKeyUsage. The API-key persistence path in APIGatewayService.persistUsageLogWithInterfaceType must pass these detail fields through; otherwise billing may calculate cache pricing correctly while usage logs persist zero detail tokens.
summary: GatewayUsageLog cache and multimodal token fields must stay aligned across entity, migration, repository input, and API key persistence path.

title: 完成 NewApi 实际计费与视频渠道配置提交
summary: [done] 已提交一组围绕 NewApi 的网关改动：聊天/图像/视频优先按上游 NewApi 日志做实际计费并保留本地兜底；增加 gateway_request_id 与 upstream_request_id 的落库和前端展示；视频协议从 jimeng_video 迁移到 NewAPI /v1/videos；补充计费流程文档并优化后台渠道编辑弹窗布局。验证通过 go test ./internal/service/api_gateway/...、go test ./internal/service/gatewaybilling/...、go test ./internal/service/leap_lite/... ./tests/leap_lite/... 和 frontend npm run typecheck。提交 hash 为 51b922d。

title: Gateway chat models support context window token limits
content: Implemented in backend entity meta accessors, admin gateway channel DTO/service mapping, API model catalog response, LeapLite model config, and AdminInterfaceChannelsPage editor. Added tests for meta parsing, catalog merge/propagation, runtime validation, and LeapLite propagation.
summary: MercAll gateway channel model metadata now uses `context_window_tokens` for chat model context window limits. `0` means unset. Admin channel model save stores the value in `gateway_channel_models.meta`; list/discovery DTOs and `/v1/models` `APIModelResp` expose it; LeapLite model config forwards it. Proxy requests validate configured chat limits before preauthorization using existing local token estimates, rejecting over-limit requests without charging or calling upstream. Aggregated model catalogs merge duplicate model limits conservatively by choosing the smaller positive value.

title: NewAPI 视频本地估算改为按参数驱动
content: 基于本地抓包推断的 Seedance 估算策略，fast 5 秒 1280x720 的最终估算约为 108900 completion_tokens，预扣估算约为 250000 completion_tokens；标准版模型会额外乘质量系数，1080p 默认按 1920x1080 分辨率换算。相关测试覆盖了创建预扣、查询有 usage 和查询无 usage 三种路径。
summary: 网关视频本地估算不再固定使用 1000 completion_tokens。`newapi_video_proxy.go` 现在会解析 `/v1/videos` 请求体中的 `model`、`seconds`、`size`，按参数生成两套 usage：预扣 usage 使用更保守的预授权估算，最终无上游 usage 时使用较低的最终估算 usage。任务路由缓存新增 `FinalEstimateUsage`，视频查询完成但上游缺少 usage 时优先用该值结算。

title: 提交视频参数化本地估算改动
summary: [done] 已提交 NewAPI 视频本地计费估算改动，commit 为 2700b12。网关不再对 `/v1/videos` 固定使用 1000 completion_tokens 兜底，而是解析 `model`、`seconds`、`size` 生成预扣估算和最终估算两套 usage；查询完成但上游无 usage 时优先按最终估算值结算。验证通过 `go test ./internal/service/api_gateway/...` 与 `go test ./internal/service/gatewaybilling/...`。

title: LeapLite extension media base URLs use backend root

source.ref: remove /v1 from LeapLite image/video extension base_url

content: Implemented in `buildLeapLiteExtensionsConfigWithInput` by sourcing image and video extension `base_url` from `GatewayRootURL` (derived from `GatewayBaseURL` only as a fallback). Tests assert both legacy `/config` and raw `/new-config` extension image/video base URLs are root URLs.

summary: [done] Implemented gateway protocol support for OpenAI image generation/edit endpoints and Jimeng video submit endpoint. Query-only fallback from usage logs can route tasks but cannot safely settle if the authorization metadata was lost.

title: Gateway pricing empty fields mean zero and all-zero means free
content: Implemented in `AdminInterfacePricingPage` by defaulting new pricing form price/multiplier fields to empty strings and parsing empty strings as 0. Implemented in `APIGatewayService.UpsertPricings`, `resolveGatewayDisplayPrices`, and `gatewaybilling` display-price helpers by preserving rounded zero values directly. Tests cover all-zero save persistence, zero multiplier display prices, and zero multiplier billing behavior.
summary: MercAll gateway pricing now treats empty admin pricing inputs as `0`; if every upstream price, multiplier, and extra fee is `0`, the model is a free model. Backend save, display-price calculation, and billing helpers must not fallback zero multipliers to `1` or zero specific upstream prices to the main input/output price.

title: LeapLite media extension provider names differ from gateway protocols
content: Implemented in commit 7caa0f5. The backend gateway still uses `entities.GatewayProviderOpenAIImages` / `openai_images` for billable image routing, model protocols, and `/v1/images/*` APIs. Only LeapLite extension config provider strings are client-facing and use the names accepted by xkclaw: `openai_image` for leapppt image module, `leapskill` for leapimage.
summary: LeapLite extension runtime config must not use the gateway image protocol name as the client provider name. Downlink `extensions.leapppt.modules.image.provider` as `openai_image` and `extensions.leapimage.provider` as `leapskill`; keep gateway model/provider protocol `openai_images` for backend routing and media API docs.

title: LeapLite new-config leaves local path fields empty
content: This refines the Agent Control runtime config contract so backend does not hardcode client machine paths or ports. Target tests assert these fields stay empty and that the legacy LeapLite config endpoint remains separate.
summary: MercAll `GET /api/v1/user/leap-lite/new-config` leaves machine-local path/port fields empty for LeapLite local inference. Empty placeholders include `server.address`, `storage.sqlite.path`, `workspace.dir`, `tools.skills.dir`, `tools.local_exec.workdir`, `tools.local_exec.env_path`, [REDACTED:sensitive-path]`, and `tools.mcp.file`. The endpoint still emits the full Agent Control runtime config structure and business/account fields from the backend.
